steps.name: Unskip US05-01 ceremony panel appears after publishing scores
steps.criteria: Behavioral: host panel transitions to ceremony view after round scores are published; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Ceremony panel appears after publishing round scores

steps.name: Unskip US05-02 showing next ceremony question broadcasts to display and play rooms
steps.criteria: Behavioral: when Marcus clicks Show Next Question both the display room and play room receive the ceremony question; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Showing the next ceremony question sends it to both display and play rooms

steps.name: Unskip US05-03 revealing answer sends to display only not play room
steps.criteria: Behavioral: when Marcus reveals the answer the display room receives the answer and the play room receives no answer event; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Revealing the answer sends it to display only — play room does not receive it

steps.name: Unskip US05-04 all questions walked through ceremony complete shown
steps.criteria: Behavioral: after all ceremony questions are shown and answered the host panel displays ceremony-complete state and next controls become available; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: All questions walked through — ceremony complete shown and next controls available

steps.name: Unskip US06-01 end game sends game-over command and displays final leaderboard
steps.criteria: Behavioral: Marcus ends the game and the host panel displays the final leaderboard with all team scores sorted by rank; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: End Game sends the game-over command and displays the final leaderboard

steps.name: Unskip US06-02 final leaderboard tied teams shown at same rank position
steps.criteria: Behavioral: when two or more teams share the same score they appear at the same rank position in the final leaderboard; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Final leaderboard with tied teams shows both at the same rank position

steps.name: Unskip US06-03 Marcus can end the game early after only one of three rounds
steps.criteria: Behavioral: Marcus can end the game after only one round; the final leaderboard is displayed with scores from that round only and no error is shown; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Marcus can end the game early after only one of three rounds

steps.name: Unskip INF-01 quiz load fails when file cannot be read from disk
steps.criteria: Behavioral: loading a quiz from a path that does not exist returns an infrastructure error; host receives an error response; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Quiz load fails when the specified file cannot be read from disk

steps.name: Unskip INF-02 quiz load fails when file path has no extension or is malformed
steps.criteria: Behavioral: loading a quiz from a path with no extension or a malformed path returns an infrastructure error without panicking; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Quiz load fails when the file path contains no extension or is malformed

steps.name: Unskip INF-04 starting a round with an invalid round index is rejected by the server
steps.criteria: Behavioral: sending a start-round command with an out-of-range or negative round index returns a rejection message; game state is unchanged; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Starting a round with an invalid round index is rejected by the server

steps.name: Unskip INF-05 revealing a question out of order is rejected by the server
steps.criteria: Behavioral: sending a reveal-question command for an index that does not follow the expected sequence returns a rejection message; game state is unchanged; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Revealing a question out of order is rejected by the server

steps.name: Unskip ADP-01 quiz loader reads real YAML file and confirms content
steps.criteria: Behavioral: the quiz loader adapter reads an actual YAML file from disk and returns quiz content that matches the file; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: Quiz loader reads a real YAML file from disk and confirms the content

steps.name: Unskip ADP-02 WebSocket upgrade rejected with real HTTP 403 for wrong token
steps.criteria: Behavioral: a WebSocket connection attempt with an incorrect token receives an HTTP 403 Forbidden response and the upgrade is rejected; @skip removed; test passes green
steps.scenario_name: WebSocket upgrade is rejected with a real HTTP 403 for a wrong token

validation.notes: Round 1: AC coupling issues fixed (01-02, 01-03, 02-01, 02-03 rewritten to behavioral). Round 2: reviewer erroneously flagged missing step 03-04 (confirmed present at line 100). All 13 scenarios verified present with exact name matching.
